mapper.sql:
select ui.college , re.role_name , ui.password , ui.registration_date , ui.major , use.status_name , ui.name , ui.student_id , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 , ui.phone_number , ui.user_info_id
FROM user_info ui left join role_enum re on ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 = re.role_enum_id left join user_status_enum use on ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 = use.user_status_enum_id
mapper.select:
select ui.college , re.role_name , ui.password , ui.registration_date , ui.major , use.status_name , ui.name , ui.student_id , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 , ui.phone_number , ui.user_info_id
FROM user_info ui left join
role_enum
re on ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 = re.role_enum_id left join
user_status_enum
use on ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 = use.user_status_enum_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
